where.if: AND (name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR file_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR path LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))

mapper.select:
SELECT id, volumn_name as volumnName, gubun, path, file_name as fileName, name, pdir, extension, size, sha1_cd as sha1Cd, srch_key as srchKey, last_modified_ymd as lastModifiedYmd, pid, right_pid as rightPid FROM cms.hdd
ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{skip}

SELECT id, volumn_name as volumnName, gubun, path, file_name as fileName, name, pdir, extension, size, sha1_cd as sha1Cd, srch_key as srchKey, last_modified_ymd as lastModifiedYmd, pid, right_pid as rightPid FROM cms.hdd WHERE id = #{id}
